title: Can a regular license holder on Monday be a member on monday dev version board too

posts.author: someuser (Kiran Tiwana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I work for a organisation with enterprise licences for both regular Monday and Monday dev.
However, Monday dev its only available to my team as we are developers. I have project that needs the input of the non-dev license holders, I also need these member to be able to edit the board.
Is there a way to grant them permission to dev board with needing to purchase more licence as its just temporary just until the project is running.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kiran,

At this time, those team members will need to have a monday dev license in order to access any boards within monday Dev product, I apologise for the setback here I will share your feedback with our team internally!

posts.author: rjbush (Robert Bush)
posts.cookedHtml: Are there any updates to this request? My organization has Monday work management licenses, but a few of us need Dev licenses. What is the experience for the people on dev licenses interacting with those on work mgmt?
